rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is wholly unrelated to Fam. Code §51.03, which defines juvenile delinquent conduct. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote:
Delinquent conduct is:
(1) conduct, other than a traffic offense, that violates a penal law of this state or of the United States punishable by imprisonment or by confinement in jail;
_note: Rule text (Fam. Code §51.03) bears no relation to the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption change. No conflict detected.
